briefdescription.para: This function soft resets the audio formatter DMA core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAudioFormatter instance.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the audio formatter core instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAudioFormatter instance.
is a reference to a structure containing information about a specific XAudioFormatter instance.

briefdescription.para: This function clears the interrupts for audio formatter core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAudioFormatter instance.
is the interrupt mask.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the interrupts for audio formatter core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAudioFormatter instance.
is the interrupt mask.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the interrupts for audio formatter core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAudioFormatter instance.
is the interrupt mask.

briefdescription.para: This function starts the dma for audio formatter core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAudioFormatter instance.

briefdescription.para: This function stops the dma for audio formatter core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAudioFormatter instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the hw params for audio formatter core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAudioFormatter instance.
is a pointer to the XAudioFormatterHwParams structure which contains the no. of channels, bit width, no. of periods, bytes per period, bytes per channel and buffer address.

detaileddescription.para: of bytes of data read from memory..

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Audio Formatter instance.

simplesect.para: - No. of bytes of data read from memory.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the S2MM timeout.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Audio Formatter instance.
is the Timeout value after which all the data is flushed to memory if there is no incoming data from any channel.

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the Fs multiplier value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Audio Formatter instance.
is the frequency of the MMclk.
is the sampling frequency of the system.

briefdescription.para: This function reads all the Channel Status registers and writes to a buffer.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Audio Formatter instance.
is a pointer to a buffer.
